name: horrher
short_description: horrher - a creepy exploration mystery game
detailed_description:
horrher

a creepy exploration mystery game

Here are some features and content a customer can expect to be included with their purchase . . .

Menu, Locomotion & Player Camera System, Health, Subtitles, Physics, Puzzles, Inventory, Diary, Equipment, Instant Camera, Pistol, VHS & TV, Security System, and Ladders.

Features:

Main Menu System

Enhanced Input System

Locomotion & Player Camera System (w/ Crouch, Lean, Jump, Climb, Head Bobbing, FOV, DOF, more)

Footstep System

Health System (w/ Damage, HUD, SFX)

Subtitle System (incl. Sequence, Sound)

Physics System (w/ Holding, Carrying, Throwing objects)

Puzzle System

Inspection System (incl. Zoom, Rotate, Pan, Pivot, more)

Inventory System (incl. Information, Inspection)

Diary System (w/ easy update)

Light Equipment (incl. Glowstick, Flashlight, Lighter, Torch)

Instant Camera (w/ Album)

Pistol

VHS System (incl. VHS, Player, Old TV)

TV System (incl. Channels)

Security System (w/ Panel, Camera, Alarm, Sensor, Monitor, Door)

Doors (incl. Lock System, SFX, more)

Ladders

... and more!
